And if you do, then it might not be sitting on the data back to Facebook the way you want it to, which is why you would use Magics. So here's the combo. So CBO campaigns are harder to use this with, but what you're going to find is like, CBO campaigns break a lot for whatever reason, and usually when you're doing stuff this way at the ad set level, it works the best anyway. So it doesn't matter, like, if you wanna use high ROAS plus magics, if you're fancy, great. If you're getting accurate data into Facebook, you can use magics and you can just use their regular ROAS, you know, like straight out of Facebook, as long as that data is accurate, it's all good, you know? Or if you wanna use it on Facebook, that's cool too, and you don't wanna use any of these tools, it's either way, you're gold, right? So automation is where it's at, as long as you're getting the accurate data, that's the secret weapon.
